title: oldenlandia swertioides
intro: Oldenlandia swertioides, also known as Chinese snakegrass, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia swertioides include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating various gastrointestinal problems such as diarrhea and indigestion. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule in modern supplements.
